differential_diagnoses: Anemia (secondary to occult gastrointestinal blood loss)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Obtain complete blood count (CBC) to assess for anemia
Repeat transthoracic echocardiogram to evaluate current aortic valve hemodynamics and cardiac function
Check serum B-type natriuretic peptide (BNP) or NT-proBNP levels
Obtain iron studies, ferritin, and reticulocyte count to evaluate potential anemia
Perform fecal immunochemical test (FIT) or evaluate for GI blood loss if anemia is confirmed
Consider 6-minute walk test to assess functional capacity and correlate with symptoms
